name: @gobing-ai/superskill
description: A manager for multi-agent skill, slash command, subagent, hook, MCP and etc.
author: Robin Min <minlongbing@gmail.com>

scripts.build:bundle: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target bun && bun run ../../scripts/builder.ts postbuild dist/index.js && rm -rf templates rubrics && cp -r ../../packages/core/src/templates templates && cp -r ../../packages/core/src/rubrics rubrics
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun ../../scripts/builder.ts check-publish-manifest apps/cli/package.json && bun run build:bundle && cp ../../README.md README.md
